reviews.text: Hiring Mikayla as our photographer for our wedding was the best decision we made! We first worked with her for our engagement shoot and then again for our wedding at San Sophia Overlook. From the first call she was everything you’d hope for in a photographer: creative, adventurous, and full of positive energy. On our engagement shoot, she didn’t hesitate to go the extra mile (literally into chest-deep snow!) to get unique shots. And then for our wedding, when weather forced us to audible our first look to the day before, Mikayla was totally on board, accommodating, and upbeat. Her ability to pivot smoothly made that change feel like no change at all. We were blown away by the speed and quality of the delivery - we got our wedding photos in just a couple of weeks, and it’s clear that not only is Mikayla exceptional at her craft, she also takes genuine pride in it. Our guests are still talking about how beautiful the pictures are. Mikayla - thank you for making us feel comfortable, excited and confident in front of the camera - and for giving us memories that we will treasure for the rest of our lives!

Where to even start? Mikayla was wonderful from the moment we reached out to her. She was as excited for our wedding as we were; answering our questions and giving recommendations for vendors. She was super helpful throughout and let me send her a long list of shots that I was hoping for. She was helpful in figuring out timing and also was able to get the amazing shots in a super timely way (we wanted to get to cocktail hour asap and she got it done!). She was fabulous to work with, made me feel at ease while I was nervous, and she was so professional. The photos were beautiful and Mikayla captured so many amazing reaction shots. The candids and posed photos turned out great. I have too many good things to say so I’ll summarize and say the photos are beautiful, Mikayla is beyond talented and friendly, and she got the photos to us in less than a month from the wedding!!! Thank you Mikayla!!!

Mikayla made our wedding everything we had dreamed of and more! We did an adventure elopement followed by an intimate ceremony. Mikayla suggested possible trails for our elopement and locations for our ceremony. Both locations ended up being the perfect spots. After searching an elopement website for a photographer, we selected Mikayla for her ability to capture the natural beauty of the landscape in an honest and dreamy way. It rained during our ceremony, and the pictures still ended up amazing. This was our first time having professional photos taken, but Mikayla was great at directing us, making it feel natural. Our friends and family keep telling us how incredible our photos are. If you are considering Mikayla for a traditional wedding or elopement, you won't be disappointed! Also, bring your pup along! Mikayla captured so many fabulous photos of our dog.

I won a free engagement shoot with Mikayla and let me tell you, it was the best thing that could have happened to us! Not only were her pictures amazing, but she helped my fiancé and I feel comfortable throughout the entire shoot and process. Mikayla was very friendly, easy to work with, and helped us pose in a fun non-awkward way. The location was beautiful and the hike was definitely worth it. I would definitely recommend Mikayla to anyone, and I definitely want to work with her again! Thank you Mikayla for recording this memory for Tyler and I!

Mikayla was an absolute DREAM to work with, and we are so beyond thrilled with our wedding photos. My partner and I were initially attracted to Mikayla's elopement photography because of the ways she captures couples within a landscape so beautifully. We wanted to exchange vows in private before our bigger wedding, and wanted to have Mikayla guide us and shoot that experience in addition to the wedding itself. We are SO happy we did, and were blown away that she could capture both experiences so well. For the vow exchange, Mikayla listened to our vision and presented us with multiple options for locations. She has a major talent for finding locations in the natural world that are perfect for photographing. She gave us amazing prompts that created stunning photos, and made the whole experience extremely comfortable and fun. As for the larger wedding, Mikayla and her second shooter were extremely professional and great energy to be around on a high pressure kind of day! Her photos captured the emotion of the day so well, as well as the venue, guests, details, and more. We are already dreaming about the next occasion that we can use Mikayla's lovely talents for. 10/10 would recommend!
